历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 6511 → 4472 → 22523 → 4527. In 2024, the ranking was abnormally inflated due to separate scoring for Nursing, but it returned to 4527 in 2025. Over the past three years, the core ranking fluctuated between 4472 and 4527, with a baseline of about 4527 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 182 in 2022, 124 in 2023, 168 in 2024, and 169 in 2025. In 2026, the plan includes 119 for Physics Category and 50 for Medical Category, totaling 169, unchanged from 2025. The total plan is stable, with no signals of expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 10th overall, firmly among the top ten nationally, and is a member of the elite C9 League, indicating an extremely high level of institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to online rumors about teacher ethics (the university has clarified these as false information), which have limited impact on application psychology. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure and no significant negative public opinion incidents. No historical admission anomalies indicate a cutoff signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it has 4 A+ disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Electrical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering), 5 A disciplines (Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Mechanics), and 2 A- disciplines (Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), totaling 11 A-class disciplines, with top-tier engineering strength nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communications, and Computer Science continue to be highly popular and recommended, with strong application intentions. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 2025 (approximately 463,000). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 329,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (neighboring province), with a proportion of admissions in Sichuan ranging from 2.3% to 4.0% (2022–2025), making it a relatively large cross-provincial enrollment province, with no local preference effect. Sichuan candidates have a high recognition of top-tier western engineering universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4527, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase in Sichuan candidate numbers (approximately +15.5%) leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high popularity of core engineering majors attracting high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4627, with a range of 4127–5127.

For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<4127), focus on reaching for top-tier Tier 1 majors (Qian Xuesen Class, Yuejie Class). For rankings near the upper limit of the range (>5127), use Tier 3 majors as safety options to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum admission ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1056 → 867 → 741 → 828, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking number), reaching a low of 741 in 2024 before slightly moving back to 828 in 2025, with a baseline of about 828 in 2025; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 11 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15, a decrease of 2 from 2025 (a reduction of about 11.8%), and the tightening of quotas will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 10th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with its liberal arts strength also recognized among comprehensive universities; the reputation during the 2023 college entrance examination period was somewhat negative (dormitory commuting issues), in 2024 it was somewhat negative (rumors about teacher ethics), and in 2026 the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative but mainly involves events in the science and engineering fields, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 24th (relatively popular), with overall attention at a medium-to-high level; Marxist Theory is rated A, Business Administration is rated A, indicating strong liberal arts-related disciplines; majors such as Law, Sociology, and Chinese Language and Literature rely on the university's comprehensive platform, with a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Liberal Arts Experimental Class and Network and New Media have socially differentiated popularity ranging from wait-and-see to recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan college entrance examination is about 535,000, with an estimated 206,000 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (neighboring province), with a very small proportion of liberal arts admissions in Sichuan (about 0.2%–0.3%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Sichuan candidates have stable recognition of liberal arts at western 985 universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 828, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction (17→15) intensifying competition, and the significant increase in the number of History Category candidates in Sichuan (about +15.7%), but the large increase in candidates partially offsets the effect of the enrollment reduction; the predicted minimum ranking is about 790, with a range of 695–885.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University enrolls medical students separately in Sichuan Province. In 2022, the lowest ranking for medical programs was 6511 (total plan 52 students). In 2023, due to the nursing program lowering the overall ranking to 30557 (total plan 65 students), it rebounded to 17774 in 2025 (total plan 59 students). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is reduced to 50 students (a reduction of approximately 15.25%), including 25 students for Clinical Medicine (including 5+3 integrated program and Hou Zonglian class), 8 for Nursing, 4 for Stomatology, 5 for Pharmacy, 6 for Medical Sciences (Basic/Forensic/Preventive), and 2 for Basic Medicine (Top Talent Program). The reduction in plan will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). The university's medical school (formerly Xi'an Medical University) has a long history, with strong clinical medicine programs, enjoying a high reputation in the western region and even nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs continue to maintain high application enthusiasm in Sichuan Province. Long-term programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 integrated program, Hou Zonglian class) are particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Xi'an, as a central city in the western region, has strong appeal to Sichuan candidates due to its geographical location. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is 50 students, a decrease of 9 students compared to 2025, further exacerbating the supply-demand contradiction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted lowest admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 15947, with a fluctuation range of 15548 to 16346. Due to the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan and intensified competition, the ranking is expected to rise (number decrease) compared to 2025 (17774). Candidates should fill in their applications reasonably based on their own rankings.
